one_time_description: Reassessment of previously consolidated entities resulting in removal of previously consolidated debt and assets from balance sheet
economic_notes: Nation owns interests in: Tsi Del Del Enterprises Ltd (50%), River West Forest Products Ltd (22% - inactive sawmill), Eniyud Community Forests Ltd (50%), Cariboo Indian Enterprises Ltd (7%), Central Chilcotin Rehabilitation Ltd (50%), Dandzen Development Limited Partnership (17% - solar farm 1MW PV plant). Tsi'deldel Development Corporation fully consolidated. Tsi'deldel Limited Partnership (99.99%) accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 - document is for 2023 not 2024. Reassessment of previously consolidated entities in 2023 removed Gas Bar (Redstone Gas Bar) and related debt from consolidation, which was a significant one-time structural change explaining large revenue variance vs prior year (Gas Bar was $2.1M revenue in 2022). Restricted cash includes Gaming ($1,149,030) and Social Housing ($60,848). Funds held in trust of $1,115,603 (Ottawa Trust Funds) included in financial assets. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($7,473,534) + FNHA ($2,096,916) + CMHC ($69,516) + Tsilhqot'in National Government ($1,358,922) + FNESC ($206,196) = $11,204,884 approximated to $11204888 including minor rounding. OSR = $16,171,515 - $11,204,888 = $4,966,627 includes earnings from investments, forest range revenue, rental income, interest income, and other revenue. No remuneration schedule found in extracted text.
